name: Structural Measurement Equations
description: 13 equations measuring observable economic system properties independent of labeling conventions. Physics first, labels second.
core_thesis: Economic systems should be analyzed by measuring energy flows, time allocation, and physical constraints rather than through semantic labels that obscure structural realities.

equations.name: Value Extraction to Value Labor Ratio
equations.physics_principle: Energy conservation — labor creates value, extraction diverts it. When VE/VL exceeds threshold, energy is leaving the system faster than it enters.

equations.name: Socialist Infrastructure Dependency
equations.physics_principle: Structural dependency — CUBE provides containment and stability. Infrastructure IS the cube. When SID > 0.5, the structure is collectively maintained.

equations.name: Risk Distribution Inequality
equations.physics_principle: Statistical distribution — risk is energy. Asymmetric risk = asymmetric energy load. Conservation requires the risk to go somewhere.

equations.name: Democracy Index (Power Concentration)
equations.formula: Var(P_1, P_2, ..., P_n) where P_i = W_i * I_i
equations.physics_principle: Network topology — power concentration is a topological invariant. When variance approaches infinity, the network is no longer distributed.

equations.name: Labor Wealth Ratio
equations.physics_principle: Energy accounting — labor is energy input, ownership is energy claim. When LWR < 1, claims exceed inputs.

equations.name: Money Socialist Index
equations.physics_principle: Medium of exchange is infrastructure. CUBE contains and structures. 98% collectively originated = the medium itself is collective.

equations.name: Bailout Socialism Coefficient
equations.physics_principle: Asymmetric energy transfer. When BSC > 1, more energy flows to rescue than was lost. Conservation violated — the energy comes from somewhere (collective).

equations.name: Money Multiplier
equations.physics_principle: Reaction amplification — fractional reserve is a multiplier reaction. TETRA boundary: when does multiplication become instability?

equations.name: Infrastructure Subsidy Ratio
equations.physics_principle: Energy subsidy — receiving 5-20x more infrastructure value than cost paid = hidden energy transfer. The shadow is the subsidy.

equations.name: Upward Flow Rate
equations.physics_principle: Flow direction — energy flows have direction. When UFR = 30, accumulation rate is 30x faster at the top. Flow is not balanced.

equations.name: Extraction Rate
equations.physics_principle: Energy extraction — how much of the system's output returns to the source that created it. Extraction > 0.55 = source is being depleted.

equations.name: Herfindahl-Hirschman Index
equations.physics_principle: Network concentration — HHI measures topological collapse. Competitive = distributed network. Monopoly = single node. Same physics as CORDYCEPS monoculture.

equations.name: Semantic Drift Rate
equations.physics_principle: Information entropy — stable definitions have low entropy. Drifting definitions = information loss = manipulation vector. CORDYCEPS detector.

composite.name: Overall Socialist Dependence Index
composite.sensitivity_note: Weights are not empirically derived. Sensitivity analysis should test equal weighting, PCA-derived weighting, and domain-expert weighting.
